def retry_sync(item, attempt_count, backoff_delay):
    logger = logging.getLogger(__name__)
    logger.info(
        "retrying item",
        extra={"attempt": attempt_count, "backoff": backoff_delay},
    )
    return item


def load_user(payload, request_id):
    try:
        return decode(payload)
    except Exception:
        logger.exception(
            "decode failed",
            extra={"request_id": request_id, "operation": "load_user"},
        )
        raise


def debug_payload(summary):
    logger.debug("payload summary %s", summary)


def log_outcome(customer_ref, payload):
    logger.info("success", extra={"customer_ref": customer_ref})
    logger.error("failure", extra={"customer_ref": payload["customer_ref"]})


def timed_operation(histogram):
    histogram.observe_duration(operation="timed_operation")
